dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION The recommended dose of midodrine hydrochloride tablet is 10 mg, 3 times daily. Dosing should take place during the daytime hours when the patient needs to be upright, pursuing the activities of daily living. A suggested dosing schedule of approximately 4-hour intervals is as follows: shortly before, or upon arising in the morning, midday and late afternoon (not later than 6 P.M.).
